---
title: "Chat with the Corpus"
format:
  html:
    theme: [flatly, assets/custom.scss]
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

Retrieval-augmented Q&A over the same primary-source corpus used in the
[continuity/rupture analysis](index.qmd) — Catholic, Anglican, Orthodox,
Southern Baptist, and USCCB statements from 1845–2026. Search runs entirely
in this browser tab against 1,474 documents; the answer is generated by
Claude, grounded only in the passages retrieved for your question, with
every claim cited by tradition and year.

```{=html}
<style>
  #rag-app { font-family: Georgia, "Source Serif 4", serif; max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; }
  #rag-status { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #6b6355; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; }
  #rag-tradition { font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  #rag-log { min-height: 120px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .rag-msg { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .rag-msg .rag-role { font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #8a8272; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .rag-msg.user .rag-role { color: #8a3324; }
  .rag-msg .rag-body { line-height: 1.55; white-space: pre-wrap; }
  .rag-sources { margin-top: 0.6rem; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #5c5647; }
  .rag-sources summary { cursor: pointer; color: #8a8272; }
  .rag-source-item { margin: 0.4rem 0 0.4rem 1rem; padding-left: 0.6rem; border-left: 2px solid #ddd6c9; }
  .rag-source-item a { color: #8a3324; }
  #rag-form { display: flex; gap: 0.6rem; }
  #rag-question { flex: 1; padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem; font-family: inherit; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #ddd6c9; border-radius: 4px; }
  #rag-send { padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; font-family: inherit; font-size: 1rem; background: #8a3324; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
  #rag-send:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; }
  .rag-error { color: #8a3324; }
</style>

<div id="rag-app">
  <div id="rag-status">Loading corpus…</div>
  <select id="rag-tradition" disabled>
    <option value="">All traditions</option>
    <option value="catholic">Catholic</option>
    <option value="anglican">Anglican</option>
    <option value="orthodox">Orthodox</option>
    <option value="sbc">Southern Baptist</option>
    <option value="usccb">USCCB</option>
  </select>
  <div id="rag-log"></div>
  <form id="rag-form">
    <input type="text" id="rag-question" placeholder="e.g. How did Catholic and Anglican statements on religious liberty diverge after 1960?" autocomplete="off" disabled>
    <button type="submit" id="rag-send" disabled>Ask</button>
  </form>
</div>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/minisearch@6/dist/umd/index.min.js"></script>
<script>
// Set this to your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL (see rag/cloudflare-worker/README.md).
const WORKER_URL = "https://papal-rag-proxy.YOUR-SUBDOMAIN.workers.dev/chat";
const TOP_K = 6;

const statusEl = document.getElementById('rag-status');
const traditionEl = document.getElementById('rag-tradition');
const logEl = document.getElementById('rag-log');
const formEl = document.getElementById('rag-form');
const questionEl = document.getElementById('rag-question');
const sendEl = document.getElementById('rag-send');

let miniSearch, corpus;

async function init() {
  const res = await fetch('rag/web/corpus.json');
  corpus = await res.json();

  miniSearch = new MiniSearch({
    fields: ['title', 'text'],
    storeFields: ['tradition', 'year', 'title', 'url', 'text'],
    searchOptions: { boost: { title: 2 }, fuzzy: 0.1, prefix: true },
  });
  miniSearch.addAll(corpus);

  statusEl.textContent = `${corpus.length} documents indexed — ask a question below.`;
  traditionEl.disabled = false;
  questionEl.disabled = false;
  sendEl.disabled = false;
}

function addMessage(role, html) {
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.className = 'rag-msg ' + role;
  div.innerHTML = `<div class="rag-role">${role}</div><div class="rag-body">${html}</div>`;
  logEl.appendChild(div);
  return div;
}

function escapeHtml(s) {
  return s.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
}

function renderSources(sources) {
  if (!sources.length) return '';
  const items = sources.map(s => {
    const link = s.url ? `<a href="${s.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${escapeHtml(s.title)}</a>` : escapeHtml(s.title);
    const snippet = escapeHtml(s.text.slice(0, 280));
    return `<div class="rag-source-item"><strong>${s.tradition}${s.year ? ', ' + s.year : ''}</strong> — ${link}<br><em>"${snippet}..."</em></div>`;
  }).join('');
  return `<div class="rag-sources"><details><summary>${sources.length} source${sources.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}</summary>${items}</details></div>`;
}

function buildContext(sources) {
  return sources.map(s =>
    `<excerpt tradition="${s.tradition}" year="${s.year}" title="${escapeHtml(s.title)}">\n${s.text.slice(0, 3000)}\n</excerpt>`
  ).join('\n\n');
}

formEl.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const question = questionEl.value.trim();
  if (!question) return;

  const traditionFilter = traditionEl.value;
  const results = miniSearch.search(question, traditionFilter ? { filter: r => r.tradition === traditionFilter } : {}).slice(0, TOP_K);
  const sources = results.map(r => corpus[r.id]);

  addMessage('user', escapeHtml(question));
  questionEl.value = '';
  sendEl.disabled = true;
  const assistantDiv = addMessage('assistant', '<em>thinking…</em>');

  if (sources.length === 0) {
    assistantDiv.querySelector('.rag-body').innerHTML = 'No matching passages found in the corpus for that question — try rephrasing or clearing the tradition filter.';
    sendEl.disabled = false;
    return;
  }

  try {
    const res = await fetch(WORKER_URL, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ question, context: buildContext(sources) }),
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || `request failed (${res.status})`);

    assistantDiv.querySelector('.rag-body').innerHTML =
      escapeHtml(data.answer).replace(/\n/g, '<br>') + renderSources(sources);
  } catch (err) {
    assistantDiv.querySelector('.rag-body').innerHTML = `<span class="rag-error">Error: ${escapeHtml(err.message)}. (Is WORKER_URL configured in rag-chat.qmd?)</span>`;
  } finally {
    sendEl.disabled = false;
    logEl.scrollTop = logEl.scrollHeight;
  }
});

init().catch(err => {
  statusEl.innerHTML = `<span class="rag-error">Failed to load corpus: ${escapeHtml(err.message)}</span>`;
});
</script>
```
